summary.title: Secure EKS DevSecOps Platform
summary.description: AWS EKS DevSecOps Platform with GitHub Actions, ArgoCD, Trivy, Checkov, Prometheus, Grafana, and Secrets Manager.

diagrams.title: Secure EKS DevSecOps Architecture
diagrams.description: Threat model for Kubernetes-based DevSecOps platform.

threats.title: Developer Credential Theft
threats.description: Attacker obtains GitHub credentials and pushes malicious code.
threats.mitigation: MFA, branch protection, signed commits, least privilege.

threats.title: Malicious Code Injection
threats.description: Unauthorized code introduced into source repository.
threats.mitigation: Pull request reviews, protected branches, CODEOWNERS.

threats.title: Pipeline Manipulation
threats.description: GitHub Actions workflow modified to bypass security checks.

threats.title: Container Image Vulnerabilities
threats.description: Deployment of vulnerable images into EKS.
threats.mitigation: Trivy scanning, image signing, vulnerability gates.

threats.title: Terraform Misconfiguration
threats.mitigation: Checkov scans, peer review, policy enforcement.

threats.title: Secrets Exposure
threats.description: Secrets stored in code repositories or Kubernetes manifests.
threats.mitigation: AWS Secrets Manager, secret scanning, RBAC.

threats.title: Kubernetes RBAC Abuse
threats.description: Excessive permissions granted to users or service accounts.

threats.title: Pod-to-Pod Lateral Movement
threats.description: Compromised workload communicates with unauthorized services.

threats.title: Monitoring Stack Exposure
threats.description: Prometheus or Grafana exposed to unauthorized users.

threats.title: Lack of Auditability
threats.description: Insufficient logging of deployments and cluster activity.
threats.mitigation: CloudTrail, Kubernetes audit logs, Git history.
